name_cn:
#🔥Diana Canvas G Flower Bamboo Bag#
▫️Model:655661
▫️Size:20*16*10cm
Exploded 💥 Recreating the classic bamboo 🪵 The tote shape everyone loves fused with retro classic bamboo elements❗️Made with original cowhide and G canvas, full leather lining 👍🏼Full copper hardware with two buckle straps that complement each other, highlighting a lively and elegant temperament. Fashionable and retro. The capacity is beyond imagination, it is simply too eye-catching on the street, unique, versatile, and premium!
